entry_level.description: Roles explicitly targeting new graduates or candidates with 0-1 years of experience. Excludes any role that requires 2+ years of experience or involves supervising/mentoring junior staff.

data_analytics.description: Hands-on data, analytics, BI, dashboarding, experimentation, or data science analysis roles.

software_engineering.description: Software engineer, developer, or similar engineering roles, including data/ML/platform engineering that primarily builds systems and tooling.

finance_accounting.description: Finance, accounting, treasury, FP&A, or investment analysis roles focused on financial modeling, budgeting, forecasting, or accounting.

marketing.description: Marketing, growth, brand, campaign, performance marketing, or GTM execution roles.

strategy_product_consulting.description: Generalist consulting, corporate/business strategy, business operations, corporate development/M&A strategy, and product management/product strategy roles (typical MBA-target roles).

reevaluation_note: Re-labeled 6 previously all-zero rows using ReevaluationLLMGenerator (fixed retry-on-bad-JSON, truncation=800 chars, max_output_tokens=256).
